summary: The prettier code formatter check failed because a test file contains unformatted code that does not match the project's formatting rules. The tool explicitly lists the file that needs formatting.
root_cause: Code in packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted according to the project's prettier rules.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
    Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:


packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js
evidence.reason: The prettier check explicitly identifies the file that needs formatting and instructs the user to run yarn prettier-all.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The prettier-check command failed with a non-zero exit code, confirming the formatting check did not pass.

suggested_fix: Run yarn prettier-all to format all code according to the project's prettier rules.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
